1.0.1.en: Reliability and security improvements: tolerates transient network errors without flickering offline, properly backs off on rate limits, fixes a token-refresh race when multiple thermostats are paired, removes credential and PII logging.

1.0.2.en: Artwork refresh: new app and driver imagery; per-device thermostat icon based on hardware model (Daikin One Plus has its own icon variant separate from the rotary-dial One Touch).

1.0.3.en: Author name, expanded readme, support topic link, and a couple of minor manifest tweaks. No functional changes.
